title: pelargonium × milleri
intro: Pelargonium × milleri, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the pelargonium genus, which is a type of succulent plant native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture for various health benefits.
